narrative:
Brown County has 28,728 registered voters, with 56.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 21.8 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 29.6% of registrants.
